# English Typing Test

> Free, modern typing test platform with real-time WPM, accuracy and CPM tracking. Time, words, quotes, code and custom modes, multilingual support, multiplayer races and typing mini-games.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Free typing test with real-time WPM, accuracy and CPM tracking.
- [Typing Test](/test): Take a typing test in time, words, quote, code and custom modes.
- [Typing Tests Hub](/typing-test): Dedicated SEO pages for every typing-test duration.
- [Touch Typing Lessons](/lessons): Touch typing guide, finger placement and a 6-lesson plan.
- [Leaderboard](/leaderboard): Global, country, state and city leaderboards — daily, weekly, monthly, all-time.
- [Multiplayer Race](/race): Race other typists in real time public and private rooms.
- [Typing Games](/games): Mini-games: type racer bots, reaction time, CPS, spacebar, memory, keyboard trainer.
- [Pricing](/pricing): Free forever core plan; Premium adds unlimited AI, no ads and advanced analytics.
- [Blog](/blog): Typing tips, productivity insights and product updates.
- [Sign in / Sign up](/auth): Create an account to save results, earn XP and unlock leaderboards.

## Optional

- [Tournaments](/tournaments): Scheduled typing tournaments.
